head: 8aac6da
next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 8 to begin Phase 8 (Code Components: tJava, tJavaRow, python_component, python_row_component). MANUAL_COMPONENT_AUTHORING.md is now in place — Phase 8 plans should reference it for any new component scaffolding.
context_notes: Phase 7.1 closed cleanly: 8 plans + 1 verification cycle + 1 code-review-fix loop + 1 quick task for Rule 11 follow-up. Tree clean, origin synced. Phase 8 depends on Phase 2 (Java bridge) which has been stable since 5.1/5.2 fixes. Phase 9 (tContextLoad/Routines) was already completed out of order — Phase 8 is the only remaining gate before Phase 10 (Iterate Support). When Phase 8 starts authoring code components, watch for the Rule 11 contract — the new MANUAL_COMPONENT_AUTHORING.md doc enforces it.
